headline: Equinix Accelerates Enterprise AI Workloads with Launch of Fabric Intelligence
summary: Equinix, Inc. (Nasdaq: EQIX), the world's digital infrastructure company®, today announced the availability of Equinix Fabric Intelligence™, an AI-native operational layer to manage network infrastructure. Fabric Intelligence enables enterprises to deploy AI-powered networking across their operations, a shift from legacy software-defined networking design to simplify the complexities of today's AI workflows. Powering the Equinix Distributed AI™ Hub, Fabric Intelligence introduces smart automatio

headline: Middle East & Africa Colocation Data Center Portfolio Report 2025: Detailed Analysis of 300 Existing Data Centers, 144 Upcoming Data Centers, and 133 Major Operators/Investors
summary: Discover the comprehensive MEA data center market portfolio analysis in our Excel database, providing insights on 300 existing and 144 upcoming data centers across 22 countries, including UAE, Nigeria, and South Africa. Access detailed metrics such as white-floor space, IT load capacity, and colocation pricing. Highlighting industry leaders like Khazna Data Centers and Equinix, this resource targets REITs, construction contractors, and corporate entities seeking growth opportunities. Stay ahead

headline: Equinix Unveils Fabric Intelligence To Deepen AI Network Customer Ties
summary: Equinix (NasdaqGS:EQIX) has launched Fabric Intelligence, an AI native network automation platform designed for AI workloads. The new platform introduces AI driven tools for deploying, managing, and monitoring complex network infrastructure across clouds, data centers, and edge locations. Fabric Intelligence includes natural language network commands, predictive analytics, agentic workflows, and AI centric security and connectivity features. For investors tracking Equinix at a share price...
